name: 27gal Heavy Duty Storage Tote - Brightroom™
description:
The Brightroom™ 27 Gallon Garage Storage Tote is a rugged solution for everyday organization. This durable storage bin with reinforced, snap-fit lid keeps items contained and concealed. Comfort-grip handles make lifting and carrying easier and more secure. The grooved lid and built-in keyholes provide tie-down options for safe transport in the back of a pickup truck or most hitch-mounted cargo carriers. Deep recessed lids support stable stacking, while channeled walls add strength to resist crushing under heavier loads. This heavy-duty plastic storage container keeps tools, sporting equipment, and off-season gear organized and protected, making it ideal for garages, basements, and a variety of storage projects.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
